description: Document in Arabic script. Probably an official report or petition, based on the hand and layout. The ends of ~6 lines are preserved. The subject is difficult to figure out. Reused on recto for jottings in Hebrew script in a crude hand, including excerpts from the biblical story of Jacob.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
